original: 哲学家(00:53:29): Okay, so you think about this?Yes, if what your wife would accept that we can discuss it, because when I I the couple is here, I try to make each one say any what he thinks, what he wants.I'm not here to take sides, but to make each one express what is right?What is wrong?
translation: 哲学家(00:53:29): 好的，那么你考虑过这个吗？是的，如果你妻子能接受，我们可以讨论，因为当夫妻双方都在场时，我试图让每个人都说出自己的想法和意愿。我在这里不是要偏袒任何一方，而是让每个人表达什么是对的？什么是错的？
